dr_register.DR10_v2: turnover_cost_explosion (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> REJECT_FAST. AND-conjunction (78cd22e). Cash-equity cost_drag CLEARS strong margin

dr_register.DR3: zero_cost_only_survival (S0>0 AND all S1..S4<=0) -> REJECT_FAST (mean-reversion edge thesis fresh; exit/stop redesign is the test)
dr_register.DR5: cost_stress_turns_edge_negative tier flip -> REJECT_FAST / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD carveout
dr_register.DR6: post_warmup_sizing_ambiguity_or_invalid -> REJECT_FAST (per-name; vol-normalized sizing must be valid)

first_principles_burden.vs_all_tech_sibling_draft_214bae0: different mechanic family; all-tech DRAFT preserved byte-stable; not advanced (shares the failed RSI(3)+2N mechanic)
first_principles_burden.vs_s14_d1_cross_sector_terminal: NON-RSI mechanic family (z-score vs RSI(3)); exit-to-mean vs RSI-threshold exit; vol-scaled catastrophe stop vs fixed 2N. Universe held constant DELIBERATELY to isolate the exit/stop variable. Clears T-FORBID-13/14/15. NOT a _revN_/patch. s14-d1-cross-sector chain preserved terminal/byte-stable.
first_principles_burden.vs_s9_s7_d1: single-name cross-sector basket, non-RSI z-score mean-reversion bi-directional; s7-D1 concentration lesson already addressed by measured-balanced cross-sector basket

first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design_L.exit_design: EXIT-TO-MEAN: close when price re-crosses the rolling mean (SMA_L midline). The exit IS the reversion target.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design_L.expected_effect_HYPOTHESIS_NOT_CLAIM: avg_win up + stop-frequency down -> profit/loss toward/above 1; to be TESTED at P6 IS; never asserted.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design_L.rationale: Per LESSON_S14_D1_002/003: s14-d1-cross-sector failed FAIL_SAFETY because an RSI-mid exit (small winners) + fixed 2N stop (large losers) gave profit/loss<1 despite 54.31% win. This SEAL locks an exit/stop aligned with the reversion thesis.
first_principles_exit_stop_edge_design_L.stop_design: Vol-scaled catastrophe brake: entry -/+ 3.5*sigma_L (wider than the k=2.0 entry band). Disaster brake, NOT a primary exit; NOT a fixed 2N ATR.

inherited_constraints_block_C6: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable on the cross-sector basket (expected ~60-105/y basket-summed). If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.

EXIT/STOP-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING; central thesis): exit = EXIT-TO-MEAN (close on re-cross of SMA_L; the reversion target itself); stop = vol-scaled catastrophe brake (3.5*sigma_L; NOT a fixed 2N). This is the candidate's entire reason to exist after s14-d1-cross-sector FAIL_SAFETY (LESSON_S14_D1_002/003); a hypothesis to TEST at P6 IS, never assumed.
DA3=B (BINDING): per-trade risk pct = 0.005 (0.5%); proven-safe sizing
DA4=B (BINDING): START_CASH_USD = 100000 ($100k); DR10 v2 cost_drag clears strong margin for cash equity
exit/stop-first-principles + K9-reachability + DR10-v2-reachability disciplines applied at PLAN+DRAFT+SEAL; binding for all subsequent phases
K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades_basket_summed >= 100; no relaxation at any phase
Mechanic family z-score/Bollinger mean-reversion exit-to-mean (NON-RSI) LOCKED at PLAN
z-score params LOCKED at SEAL: lookback L=20, entry band k=2.0, exit-to-mean, catastrophe stop 3.5*sigma, time-stop 10, vol-normalized sizing; modification post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50 turnover / 0.05 cost_drag immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal
split_only adjustment convention LOCKED (DA15); reuse same DR9-passed CSVs; switching/mixing post-SEAL FORBIDDEN
